summary: Completed comprehensive testing of e-commerce application. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend partially working with authentication and cart integration issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Admin session not maintained across page navigations - redirects to login when accessing /admin/products
Add to Cart button clicks but items not added to cart - cart remains empty

integration_issues.issue: Cannot access admin products page due to authentication session loss
Frontend cart integration not working - items not persisting in cart

passed_tests: Dashboard shows correct metrics (Revenue: $0.00, Orders: 1, Products: 9, Users: 3)
Add to Cart button is clickable
All backend APIs working (24/24 tests passed)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend authentication session persistence and cart integration. Admin session is lost when navigating between admin pages, and Add to Cart functionality is not working despite backend APIs being functional.
